visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a man in a white and blue patterned T-shirt standing against a neutral wall. He gestures emphatically toward the camera with his index finger while maintaining an intense, slightly comedic facial expression. (2) Transition to a laundry area where the man stands over a white plastic basket. He rummages through a white garment, his hands actively searching pockets until he pulls out several bills of currency, displaying them with a wide-eyed, triumphant grin. (3) The scene shifts to a white tabletop covered in receipts. The man aggressively empties a colorful patterned bag, scattering papers everywhere. He picks up a small pouch and a receipt, showing them to the camera with a sly expression. (4) In a kitchen setting, the man holds a yellow box of supplements. He looks directly at the lens, gesturing with his free hand to emphasize his points. The lighting is bright and even across the indoor space. (5) The man stands before a white storage cabinet filled with neatly arranged white bins. He hides a stack of cash inside a supplement box and tucks it away behind other items, looking over his shoulder with a mischievous smile. (6) He is seen cleaning a kitchen counter with a plastic card, scraping white powder into a pile. A woman in a black top enters the frame from the side, looking down at his actions with a skeptical expression. (7) The man and woman stand together in the kitchen, engaging in a high-energy dialogue. He holds a black and gold credit card while she gestures toward a box of supplements on the counter. Their expressions are animated and confrontational. (8) The man stands behind a table packed with numerous boxes of funcare brand supplements. He waves multiple packets in the air with both hands, smiling broadly as he promotes the product bundles displayed in the foreground.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥今天就告訴你. [Variety]: 為什麼男人應該包辦所有家事？ (2) [Variety]: 洗衣服. (3) [Subtitle]: 你老婆的這些髒衣服，髒褲子，口袋裡面如果有一些好東西的話... (4) [Subtitle]: 那就都是你的！ (5) [Subtitle]: 為什麼要幫你老婆整理這些包包，這些發票呢？ [Variety]: 包包、發票. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為你就知道他的錢跟我花去哪裡了啊！ [Variety]: 金錢掌控權GET! (7) [Variety]: 煮飯. (8) [Subtitle]: 煮飯為什麼要男人煮？因為這樣我就可以自己決定我想吃什麼。 [Variety]: 自己決定想吃什麼. (9) [Variety]: 整理收納. (10) [Subtitle]: 家裡的櫃子為什麼要男人整理啊？ (11) [Subtitle]: 因為你就可以把私房錢塞在他不會發現的角落。 [Variety]: 無人知曉的個人儲蓄. (12) [Subtitle]: 還有這個餐桌啦，平常就是要被我打掃整理的這樣乾乾淨淨整整齊齊。 (13) [Subtitle]: 搞什麼東西啊。那是你兒子的船井高成長粉啦。 [Logo]: 船井funcare. [Slogan]: -船井高成長粉-. (14) [Subtitle]: 那為什麼有信用卡？叫你去買啊。 (15) [Subtitle]: 哦你是說叫我買那個已經愛用推薦2年。 [Variety]: 愛用推薦2年. [Slogan]: \船井牛奶鈣魚膠原粉\. (16) [Variety]: ⚠️個人儲蓄警告⚠️. (17) [Subtitle]: 還說你有在做家事。有啊。他們天天都在吃。 (18) [Subtitle]: 他們以前都吃那個口嚼錠還是那個果凍款的。現在成長粉直接這樣吃就可以了。長大了呢。 (19) [Subtitle]: 小朋友喜歡吃，真的才能真正吸收。你沒看到快吃完了。哦我知道啊。趕快去啊。我知道。我還沒去是因為我在等... (20) [Slogan]: \船井高成長優惠團\. [Variety]: 大組 小組. (21) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥這禮拜的船井高成長優惠團又來啦。一樣有大組、小組還有混合組。而且贈品送的更多啦。 (22) [Subtitle]: 再送一罐維生素D3。有夠划算。還在等什麼？趕快手刀下單啦。

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator, 1 female character appearing halfway through.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character has short brown hair and wears a white T-shirt with light blue and beige diagonal color blocks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The scenes shift between a plain wall background, a kitchen with white countertops and dark cabinetry, a utility area with laundry baskets, and a storage area with white cabinets and organized bins.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic male voice delivering a fast-paced monologue. The vocal tone is exaggerated and comedic. A bright, high-tempo electronic background music (BGM) with a steady 4/4 beat starts immediately. (2) A sharp whoosh transition sound occurs as the speaker's environment changes. The sound of paper and fabric rustling is audible as he searches the laundry. He lets out a loud, jubilant exclamation upon finding the money. (3) Another pop sound effect punctuates a cut to the man emptying the bag. The distinct sound of many paper receipts hitting the table creates a layered, percussive texture. The BGM remains constant in the background. (4) A ding sound effect plays as text overlays appear. The speaker's voice maintains high arousal and volume. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal room resonance, suggesting a controlled indoor recording. (5) The sound of a cabinet door opening and plastic bins sliding is heard. The man's voice drops slightly in volume to a conspiratorial whisper, then rises back to a high-pitched, excited tone as he finishes hiding the money. (6) A rhythmic scraping sound of the card against the table is prominent. A female voice enters with a sharp, inquisitive tone, creating a vocal counterpoint to the man's lower-pitched but still energetic responses. (7) The dialogue becomes a rapid-fire exchange between the male and female speakers. There is significant overlapping speech. The BGM continues to pulse underneath, maintaining a high energy level throughout the argument. (8) The man's voice returns to a singular, loud promotional tone. He speaks with high dominance and clarity. The BGM reaches a peak volume before a final whoosh sound effect marks the end of the promotional segment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Logic -> Evidence -> Climax -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous skit about a husband's 'secret benefits' of doing housework (finding money, controlling spending, hiding private savings) to pivot into an endorsement for funcare growth supplements. It appeals to parents through a relatable domestic scenario and energetic promotion of a discount bundle.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a prolonged segment dedicated to showing product packaging, discussing the benefits of the growth supplement, and providing specific group-buy pricing and free gift information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form video style with dense text overlays and fast-paced audio editing characteristic of social media marketing.
